documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Regulatory forms and GDPR documents
documents.rgpd_desc: All documents comply with GDPR. Collected data is retained for a maximum of 5 years. Clients can exercise their rights of access, rectification and erasure at any time.

settings.title: Settings
settings.demo_no_save: Data is not saved in demo mode.

rgpd.consent_text: I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with GDPR
rgpd.rights: You have the right to access, rectify and delete your data

archives.title: GDPR Archives
archives.auto_archive: Clients will be automatically archived after 3 years

soins.doc_subtitle: Document to be given to the client after each session
soins.trademark: Registered trademark — descriptive use only, no commercial affiliation
soins.declaration_1: I declare that I have been informed of the risks associated with piercing
soins.declaration_2: I was able to ask all the questions I wanted

oreilles.title: EARS

zones.desc: Fleshy part of the lobe. Jewelry: Stud, ring.
Upper part of the lobe. Jewelry: Stud, ring.
Upper edge of the cartilage. Jewelry: Ring, stud.
Inner fold of the cartilage. Jewelry: Curved barbell.
Small protrusion in front of the canal. Jewelry: Labret, ring.
Protrusion opposite the tragus. Jewelry: Ring, curved barbell.
Central shell of the cartilage. Jewelry: Large ring, barbell.
Innermost fold. Jewelry: Ring, horseshoe.
Upper inner fold. Jewelry: Curved barbell.
Double perforation connected by a bar. Jewelry: Long straight barbell.

faire: Clean 2×/day with saline solution NaCl 0.9%.
Dry with a sterile non-woven compress.
Sleep on a travel pillow to avoid pressure.
Keep hair tied back for the first weeks.
eviter: Swimming pool, sea, bath during healing.
Headphones, phone pressing on the piercing.
Touching or rotating the jewelry.
Changing jewelry before complete healing.

nez.title: NOSE

zones.desc: Side of the nostril. Jewelry: Stud, ring.
Nasal septum (fleshy part). Jewelry: Horseshoe, ring.
Bridge of the nose between the eyes. Jewelry: Straight barbell.

faire: Clean 2×/day with saline solution NaCl 0.9%.
Dry with a sterile compress.
Blow nose gently without moving the jewelry.
eviter: Glasses pressing on the pierced area.
Blowing nose forcefully.
Makeup on the area.
Touching or manipulating the jewelry.

nombril.title: NAVEL

zones.desc: Upper edge of the navel. Jewelry: Curved barbell (banana bell).
Lower edge of the navel. Jewelry: Curved barbell.

faire: Clean 2×/day with saline solution NaCl 0.9%.
Wear loose, breathable clothing.
Dry thoroughly after showering.
Avoid belts or elastic waistbands pressing on the area.
eviter: Swimming pool, sea, bath during healing.
Tight clothing on the area.
Intense sport in the first weeks.
Creams or oils on the area.

mamelons.title: NIPPLES

zones.desc: Horizontal crossing of the nipple. Jewelry: Straight barbell.
Vertical crossing of the nipple. Jewelry: Straight barbell.

faire: Clean 2×/day with saline solution NaCl 0.9%.
Wear a sports bra without irritating seams.
Dry thoroughly after showering.
eviter: Bra with underwires or rough materials.
Contact sports or activities with friction.
Swimming pool, sea, bath during healing.
Manipulation or pressure on the area.

arcade_sourcil.title: EYEBROW

zones.desc: Edge of the eyebrow ridge. Jewelry: Curved barbell, ring.
Below the eye, surface. Jewelry: Surface bar.

faire: Clean 2×/day with saline solution NaCl 0.9%.
Dry with a sterile compress.
Watch for signs of rejection (skin thinning).
eviter: Makeup near the pierced area.
Glasses pressing on the piercing.
Touching or manipulating the jewelry.

surface_dermal.title: SURFACE & DERMAL

zones.desc: Single anchor under the skin. Jewelry: Decorative head on anchor.
Bar crossing a skin fold. Jewelry: Surface bar.

faire: Clean 2×/day with saline solution NaCl 0.9%.
Protect the area from shocks and friction.
Watch for signs of rejection or migration.
eviter: Clothing rubbing on the area.
Contact sports in the first weeks.
Touching or manipulating the jewelry.

bouche_levres.title: POST LABRET CARE

zones.desc: Centered below lower lip, horizontal. Jewelry: Straight labret.
Left or right below lower lip. Jewelry: Straight labret.
Crosses the center of the lower lip vertically. Jewelry: Curved barbell.
Centered lower lip — 1 ball visible, 1 inside. Jewelry: Flatback.
Centered above upper lip, in the philtrum. Jewelry: Straight labret.
Above upper lip, left side. Jewelry: Straight labret.
Above upper lip, right side. Jewelry: Straight labret.
Center of tongue, vertical. Most common. Jewelry: Long barbell.
Membrane under the tongue. Discreet, low pain. Jewelry: Ring / curved.
Upper lip frenulum — visible when smiling. Jewelry: Ring, horseshoe.

faire: Rinse mouth with ALCOHOL-FREE mouthwash after each meal.
Clean the outside (labret, medusa, Monroe…) 2×/day with NaCl 0.9% saline.
Eat cold or lukewarm food in the first days to reduce swelling.
Replace the long jewelry with a short one once swelling subsides (Day 10-14).
Use implant-grade titanium or bioplastic jewelry to protect teeth and gums.
Gentle brushing 2×/day without rubbing the jewelry.
eviter: Alcohol, tobacco, spicy or very acidic foods for the first 2-3 weeks.
Oral contact (kissing, etc.) during healing.
Playing with the jewelry — risk of tooth fracture and gum recession.
Sharing glasses, cutlery, or toothbrushes.
Keeping the initial long jewelry too long (dental damage).
Swimming pool, sea, contact sports in the acute phase.
Changing jewelry yourself before complete healing.
